item.title: 100k🤯 Thank you for all the support, it really makes all the dif...

View on Instagram


100k🤯 Thank you for all the support, it really makes all the difference!🌵 To show a little gratitude you can find the lesson, TAB and backing track for this solo FREE on my Patreon (link in bio)! Just search for ”Country solo in A7 #2”#guitar #guitarist #telecaster #guitarsolo #guitarlicks#doublestops #country #countryguitar #chickenpicking
